The New Standard in PT Management

Scale your fitness
ecosystem seamlessly.

A unified SaaS platform for Gyms to onboard elite talent and for Trainers to manage their PT business across multiple locations.

Start as GymJoin as Trainer

For Gym Owners

Consolidate your trainer roster, verify credentials automatically, and provide your members with the highest quality personal training experience.

  • Verified credential tracking
  • Centralized billing & session logs
  • Real-time availability monitoring
Start onboarding your facility
[Gym Dashboard Preview]

For Personal Trainers

Maintain one profile, manage two contexts. Your schedules, members, and availability synced across your gym partners.

  • Zero-conflict cross-gym scheduling
  • Professional portfolio showcase
  • Instant member session tracking
Create your professional profile
